label: 建筑开窗
description: 在墙体网格中随机或均匀打开指定数量和宽度的窗洞，窗洞仅在墙体两侧均为空格的有效位置生成。
description-en: Punches window openings of specified count and width into a wall grid; openings are only placed on wall segments that have open space on both sides.
icon: 扁平插画风格小图标。建筑俯视平面图，深灰色矩形墙体轮廓，墙上均匀分布2~3个小矩形缺口表示窗洞，窗洞处用浅蓝色（天蓝）填充，形象表达开窗动作。主色深灰墙体配天蓝窗口，简洁现代。

inputs.name: gridList
inputs.label: 墙体网格列表
inputs.description: 墙体掩码网格列表，每个网格的非零值视为墙体
inputs.description-en: List of wall mask grids; non-zero values in each grid are treated as wall cells.

inputs.name: windowCount
inputs.label: 开窗数量
inputs.description-en: Total number of window openings to place.

inputs.name: windowWidth
inputs.label: 窗宽（格）
inputs.description: 每个窗洞沿墙方向的宽度（格子数），最小为1
inputs.description-en: Width of each window opening in cells along the wall direction; minimum is 1.

inputs.name: randomEnable
inputs.label: 随机开启
inputs.description: true=随机选择窗洞位置；false=按均匀间距分配
inputs.description-en: true = randomly select window positions; false = evenly distribute windows along wall.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 使用当前时间戳
inputs.description-en: Random seed; 0 uses the current timestamp.

outputs.name: outputGridList
outputs.label: 开窗后网格列表
outputs.description: 与输入列表一一对应，每个网格中窗洞处=0，其余保持原值
outputs.description-en: List of grids corresponding to input; window opening cells=0, all others retain original values.

outputs.name: windowGridList
outputs.label: 窗列表
outputs.description: 与输入列表一一对应，每个网格中窗洞处=1，其余为0
outputs.description-en: List of grids corresponding to input; window opening cells=1, all other cells=0.
